Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9B93 "OGRE-C500-9B93" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ogre (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C500 which: 1. Turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Sets the correct border and screen colours 3. Initialises colour RAM for the loading screen to display correctly 4. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game
